## Epic 6 — Combat & Equipment (#78)

**Dependency:** #50, #71
**Est. Effort:** Large

### Goal
Write chapter 17 — Magic Items, adapting magic items to the dice type system.

### Chapter Structure
1. **Magic Item Overview** — How magic items work in HoL
2. **Attunement** — (if any) limits on magic items
3. **Magic Weapons** — Enhanced W/S/S damage, special properties
4. **Magic Armor** — Enhanced DR, resistances
5. **Wondrous Items** — Utility magic items
6. **Rings, Rods, Staves** — Charged items
7. **Scrolls & Potions** — Consumable magic
8. **Artifacts** — Legendary items
9. **Magic Item Tables** — By rarity, by type

### Dice Type Interaction
- Magic weapons may grant temporary dice types while wielded
- Some items reduce dice prerequisites for spell chains
- Artifacts may grant permanent dice types

### Tasks
- [ ] Design 30-50 magic items
- [ ] Design magic item rarity system
- [ ] Create magic item tables
- [ ] Build and fix errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: dice types (ch08), magic system (ch10)
